meta.title: Rooviz — Visual Archive
meta.description: A web design & development studio translating brand nuance into digital language.

about.metaDescription: Rooviz is a one-person web design and development studio translating brand nuance into digital language. We craft corporate sites, brand sites, and portfolios.
about.label: About
about.heading: Brand nuance, in digital language
about.intro: Rooviz is a web design and development studio run by a single pair of hands and eyes. We translate the grain of a brand into form, structure, and motion — creating digital experiences free of excess.
about.philosophy: We focus on subtraction over addition. Trust is built through proportion, white space, and typography — not ornamentation. Every interaction should flow softly. Every word should sit where it belongs.

services.title: Corporate & brand websites
services.desc: Full-stack corporate sites covering company profiles, product lineups, and careers pages.

services.title: Portfolios & archives
services.desc: Image-led portfolio sites for artists, designers, and studios.

services.title: Renewals & rebrands
services.desc: Re-defining structure and visual language for existing sites — lifting search visibility and conversion together.

about.stack: Next.js · React · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Framer Motion · GSAP · Vercel · Stripe. Every site ships with fast loading, SEO-friendly structure, and mobile-first design as defaults.
about.process: Begins with a brief interview, then follows four stages — Discover · Design · Develop · Deliver — in one continuous breath. Most sites go live within four to eight weeks.
about.cta: Project inquiries or simple questions, both welcome. Reach out by email — we reply within one business day.

steps.title: Discover
steps.desc: A brief interview to grasp the grain of the brand.

steps.title: Design
steps.desc: Structure shaped by typography and whitespace.

steps.title: Develop
steps.desc: Built on Next.js for performance and longevity.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.desc: Operational guidance that continues after launch.

testimonials.quote: They translated our complex requirements into a clear language. We've kept trusting them well past delivery.
testimonials.author: Jangahn Tower

testimonials.quote: The visual language and flow gave our service a quiet, solid sense of trust.
testimonials.author: Worholpass
